# llms.txt — Oob Skulden™
# https://oobskulden.com
# Updated: 2026-03

# About
Oob Skulden™ is a security research blog covering homelab infrastructure
security, AI infrastructure attack surfaces, CVE research, and hardening
guides. Content targets technically sophisticated practitioners. All testing
is conducted in private lab environments.

# Content License
All content is copyright Oob Skulden™. You may reference and summarize
content for informational purposes. Do not reproduce full posts verbatim.

# Series

## AI Infrastructure Security Series
Full attack-and-harden series covering self-hosted AI stacks.
Components covered: Ollama, Open WebUI, LiteLLM, RAG pipelines,
ChromaDB, DLP, MCP servers, CrewAI agent trust boundaries.

- https://oobskulden.com/2026/02/ai-infrastructure-isnt-magic-its-the-same-problems-you-already-know-stacked-differently/
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/02/i-broke-my-own-identity-provider/
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/03/hardening-authentik-every-misconfiguration-i-found-in-my-own-idp/
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/03/i-broke-into-an-ai-chatbot-using-a-fake-model.-heres-exactly-how./
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/03/five-ai-security-tools-found-what-curl-already-knew--but-faster-and-with-receipts/

## Grafana Monitoring Stack Series
Build, audit, and harden a production Grafana stack.

- https://oobskulden.com/2026/02/authentik--grafana-oauth-sso-across-vlans-and-the-11-things-that-broke/
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/02/15-vulnerabilities-in-a-grafana-monitoring-stack-and-how-we-found-them/
- https://oobskulden.com/2026/02/i-hardened-a-grafana-stack-from-please-hack-me-to-production-ready.-heres-every-command-i-ran./

# Primary Topics
- Ollama unauthenticated API exposure
- Open WebUI CVE-2025-64496 exploitation and hardening
- Authentik identity provider security and misconfiguration
- Grafana monitoring stack attack surface
- Docker container security and network segmentation
- JWT authentication weaknesses in self-hosted AI
- RAG pipeline security and prompt injection
- MCP server trust boundaries
- NIST 800-53, SOC 2, CIS Controls, PCI-DSS compliance mapping

# CVEs Covered
- CVE-2025-64496 (Open WebUI SSE code injection)
- CVE-2024-37032 (Ollama Probllama path traversal)
- CVE-2024-39720 (Ollama malformed GGUF segfault)
- CVE-2024-39721 (Ollama DoS via CreateModel)
- CVE-2024-39722 (Ollama file enumeration)
